channel.title: NewsAnarchist
channel.description: Independent journalism. The stories mainstream media won't cover.

item.title: Another Court Rules Copyright Can’t Stop People From Reading and Speaking the Law
item.description: Another court has ruled that copyright can’t be used to keep our laws behind a paywall. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit upheld a lower court’s ruling that it is fair use to copy and disseminate building codes that have been incorporated into federal and state law, even though
item.content:encoded: <div class="field field--name-body field--type-text-with-summary field--label-hidden"><div class="field__items"><div class="field__item even"><p>Another court has <a href=" title="Third Circuit Opinion in ASTM v Upcodes">ruled</a> that copyright can’t be used to keep our laws behind a paywall. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit upheld a lower court’s ruling that it is fair use to copy and disseminate building codes that have been incorporated into federal and state law, even though
item.dc:creator: NewsAnarchist Desk

item.title: 'Project Hail Mary' Writer Credits Not Going Woke For Film's Success
item.description:
'Project Hail Mary' Writer Credits Not Going Woke For Film's Success

With an $80.6 million domestic opening weekend, a 95% critics’ score on Rotten Tomatoes, and a 96% audience score, Project Hail Mary is an undeniable blockbuster hit.</
item.content:encoded: <span property="schema:name" class="field field--name-title field--type-string field--label-hidden">'Project Hail Mary' Writer Credits Not Going Woke For Film's Success</span> <div property="schema:text" class="clearfix text-formatted field field--name-body field--type-text-with-summary field--label-hidden field__item"><p><strong>With an $80.6 million domestic opening weekend, a 95% critics’ score on Rotten Tomatoes, and a 96% audience score, Project Hail Mary is an undeniable blockbuster hit.</
item.dc:creator: NewsAnarchist Desk
